source: curated seed (PARTIAL) -- not a full SAP cloudification-repository export
note: Replace cloudification_repository.json with a full export of SAP's public cloudification repository to raise coverage. The scanner treats any object/API absent from the repo as 'unknown' (counted, never a blocker), so a partial pack never manufactures a false blocker -- but a TIER_1_READY object whose API refs are 'unknown' is reported PARTIAL coverage, never a clean pass. See README.md for the customer override + update path.
